agribalyse.name_en: Mix of salted grains/nuts and raisins
agribalyse.name_fr: Mélange apéritif de graines salées et raisins secs

ingredients_text: 30% jordnötter (95% jordnötter, solrosolja, salt), 20% russin (99,5% russin, solrosolja), 20% cashewnötter (96% cashew - nötter, solrosolja, 1% havssalt), 20% honungsrostade jordnötter (75% jordnötter, socker, 5% honung, solrosolja, salt, majsstärkelse, stabiliseringsmedel (metylcellulosa, xantangummi), arom), 10% chilinötter (56% jordnötter, potatisstärkelse, rapsolja, solrosolja, modifierad stärkelse, socker, salt, maltodextrin, paprika, cayennepeppar, jästextrakt, spiskummin, chili, vitlök, tomatpulver, surhetsreglerande medel (citronsyra), kryddextrakt (paprika, spiskummin), arom, lök, svartpeppar, bakpulver (natriumkarbonater), färgämne (paprikaextrakt)).
ingredients_text_en: 30% peanuts (95% peanuts, sunflower oil, 1.1% sea salt), 20% raisins (99.5% raisins, 0.5% sunflower - olia), 20% cashews (96% cashews, sunflower oil, 1.1% sea salt), 20% honey-roasted peanuts (83% peanuts, sugar, 5% honey, sunflower oil, peanut oil, salt, potato starch, maltodextrin, thickener (xantangum rubber)), 10% chilli nuts (56% peanuts, potato starch, rapeseed oil, 4% spice mix (salt, wheat flour, sugar, peppers, cayenne pepper, yeast extract, cumin, chilli pepper, garlic, tomato, acidity regulator (citric acid), spice extract (paprika, cumin), aroma , onions, black pepper), modified starch, sugar, salt, maltodextrin, baking powder (sodium bicarbonate), dye (paprika extract)),
